string.name: transfer_detecting_description
string.value: Reading Taildrop capability and devices from the VPN backend.

string.name: transfer_admin_disabled_description
string.value: Enable file sending in the Tailscale admin console.

string.name: transfer_unavailable_description
string.value: Transfer devices could not be read. Try again shortly.

string.name: transfer_targets_ready_description
string.value: Device discovery is ready. File selection and send progress come next.

string.name: transfer_no_targets_description
string.value: No eligible devices found. Make sure another Taildrop device is online.

string.name: transfer_send_target_unavailable
string.value: The selected device is no longer available.

string.name: transfer_send_disconnected
string.value: Tailscale disconnected before the transfer finished.

string.name: transfer_file_selection_failed
string.value: Could not open the file picker.

string.name: transfer_file_copy_failed
string.value: Could not prepare the selected files.

string.name: transfer_subtitle
string.value: Secure file transfer between your devices

string.name: transfer_taildrop_description
string.value: Files travel over your encrypted Tailscale connection using the best available path.

string.name: transfer_connected_description
string.value: File sending will be connected first, followed by receiving and export.

string.name: transfer_connect_first_description
string.value: Taildrop requires an active connection before devices can exchange files.

string.name: transfer_empty_description
string.value: Sent and received files will appear here when Taildrop is enabled.

string.name: glow_description
string.value: Adjust the light response on buttons and the bottom bar.

string.name: description_connected
string.value: This device is connected to your private Tailscale network

string.name: description_connecting
string.value: Setting up the system VPN. Please wait.

string.name: description_login_required
string.value: Complete Tailscale sign-in in the system browser first

string.name: description_problem
string.value: Open engineering diagnostics to see error details

string.name: description_tls_problem
string.value: Secure control-plane verification failed. Check the system time and network, then try again.

string.name: description_network_problem
string.value: Tailscale could not reach the network. Check Wi-Fi or mobile data, then try again.

string.name: description_vpn_permission_problem
string.value: The system VPN could not start. Allow the VPN request and try connecting again.

string.name: description_vpn_conflict_problem
string.value: Another VPN connection is already active. Choose Connect again to replace it.

string.name: vpn_conflict_message
string.value: Another VPN connection is already active. Continuing will disconnect it.

string.name: description_status_problem
string.value: The VPN status is temporarily unavailable. Reopen the app and try again.

string.name: description_disconnected
string.value: Connect to access other devices through Tailscale

string.name: description_approval_required
string.value: Approve this device in the Tailscale admin console

string.name: description_key_expired
string.value: Sign in to Tailscale again to renew the device key

string.name: exit_node_description
string.value: Route internet traffic through another device

string.name: exit_node_empty
string.value: No exit nodes are available in this network

string.name: exit_node_none
string.value: Do not use an exit node

string.name: exit_node_login_required
string.value: Sign in to view and select exit nodes for this network.

string.name: exit_node_disconnect_first
string.value: Disconnect to change the exit node

string.name: peer_connectivity_no_address
string.value: This peer has no reachable Tailscale address.

string.name: peer_connectivity_unavailable
string.value: Peer connectivity testing is temporarily unavailable.

string.name: device_copy_unavailable
string.value: No device value is available to copy

string.name: account_signed_in
string.value: This device is signed in to Tailscale.

string.name: account_signed_out
string.value: Sign in to manage this device and connect to your private network.

string.name: logout_description
string.value: After signing out, this device must sign in again before connecting.

string.name: logout_confirm_message
string.value: This device will leave the current Tailscale network. You will need to sign in again to use it later.

string.name: diagnostic_report_description
string.value: Creates a privacy-redacted ZIP with the device model, versions, status summaries, counts, settings, and recent structured events. Raw logs and identity or network details are excluded.

string.name: diagnostic_report_failed
string.value: Failed to generate or share the diagnostic report.

string.name: network_settings_description
string.value: Choose how this device uses your private network

string.name: setting_subnet_routes_description
string.value: Reach networks shared by other devices

string.name: setting_magicdns_description
string.value: Use device names on your Tailscale network

string.name: setting_exit_node_lan
string.value: Allow LAN access with exit node

string.name: setting_exit_node_lan_description
string.value: Keep access to nearby devices while using an exit node

string.name: network_setting_failed
string.value: The setting could not be saved. Try again.

string.name: control_server_description
string.value: Enter a backend server address to continue. If you are unsure what this is, use the default address. The app stays offline until you confirm.

string.name: control_server_saved
string.value: Backend server saved. You can now sign in.

string.name: control_server_invalid
string.value: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS control server URL without query parameters.

string.name: control_server_save_failed
string.value: The control server could not be saved. Try again.

string.name: control_server_disconnect_first
string.value: Disconnect before changing the backend server.

string.name: control_server_guide_message
string.value: Tailscale OHOS will not connect to any server until you confirm an address. The official Tailscale server is prefilled, or you can enter your self-hosted Headscale address in Settings.

string.name: control_server_required_to_connect
string.value: Confirm a backend server in Account settings first.

string.name: description_server_required
string.value: Choose and confirm a backend server before Tailscale starts.

string.name: control_server_first_run_tip
string.value: Enter a backend server address in Settings and sign in first

string.name: diagnostic_first_run_tools_description
string.value: Engineering actions for testing first-run setup and unexpected system VPN disconnection. Each action is recorded in the diagnostic event log.

string.name: diagnostic_reset_first_run_action
string.value: Clear data and simulate first launch

string.name: diagnostic_reset_first_run_confirm_message
string.value: This removes the confirmed backend server and local Tailscale account state, then returns to the first-run guide.

string.name: diagnostic_reset_first_run_failed
string.value: Could not fully clear first-run data

string.name: diagnostic_force_vpn_stop_failed
string.value: Could not stop the system VPN
